headline: Assessing MGM Resorts (MGM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
summary: Why MGM Resorts International (MGM) is on investor radars MGM Resorts International (MGM) has attracted attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing double digit returns over the past month and over the past three months. That performance is prompting fresh questions around value and earnings power. See our latest analysis for MGM Resorts International. At a share price of $39.40, MGM’s recent momentum shows up in a 7.21% 7 day share price return and 11.39% 30 day share...
